We are currently hiring Senior Software Engineers for the following teams:芒聙聯 Workload Optimization 芒聙聯 Automates work... golang, software, senior 2026-05-07T18:00:02+00:00 1131507 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-senior-software-engineer-cast-ai-1131507 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Clinical Provider Intellect <p>You will be a practitioner on our telehealth platform 'Intellect', where your role is to support our clients' mental health and personal growth based on the individual needs and goals. This is delivered primarily through scheduled 60-minute video sessions on our platform.</p><p></p><p>This is a freelance remote role with the flexibility to decide your business hours. Local candidates are preferred but others can still be considered. This role is a great opportunity to supplement your current job or private practice.</p><p></p><p>We're seeking to partner with Clinical Psychologists and Counsellors to be part of a community working collaboratively to bring greater mental health access to the public to provide mental health coaching</p><p>What You'll Do</p><ul> <li>Provide 1-on-1 telehealth/or onsite mental health support for Intellect芒聙聶s clients</li> <li>Focus on clinical cases such as depression, anxiety, trauma, schizophrenia, eating disorders, addiction etc.</li> <li>Collaboratively work with the internal clinical team by suggesting improvements to the program and the platform</li> </ul><ul> <li>Has a Masters in Counselling or Clinical Psychology</li> <li>Candidates must be skilled in Cognitive Behavioural Therapy or other evidence-based approaches (e.g. Motivational Interviewing, DBT, SFBT, etc.)</li> <li>Candidate must have at least 300 clinical hours post masters degree</li> <li>Candidate can communicate in English and their local language</li> <li>Candidates with prior experience in EAP, counselling working adults or coaching managerial roles is a plus</li> <li>Candidates who are open to working onsite if necessary is a plus</li> </ul><ul> <li>Remote role with the flexibility to decide your business hours</li> <li>Great opportunity to supplement your current job or private practice</li> </ul> support, growth, video Krak脙鲁w 2026-05-07T14:00:09+00:00 1131505 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-clinical-provider-intellect-1131505 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Senior Data Engineer Valon Mortgage <h2><strong>About the Company</strong></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em"> Valon is transforming both mortgage servicing and consumer direct lending with a technology-first approach. Backed by Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) and managing over $130 billion in loans, we芒聙聶ve built our platforms from the ground up芒聙聰not on outdated legacy systems芒聙聰so homeowners, lenders, and investors experience greater transparency, efficiency, and care. By unifying processes into a modern, AI-native operating system, we芒聙聶re leading the way in automation, compliance, and continuous improvement across our servicing and lending businesses.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Our mission is to empower every homeowner by making the mortgage experience simple, secure, and financially empowering. To achieve this, we bring together world-class engineers, servicing experts, lending professionals, and operations leaders who share a passion for improving the homeowner journey. We芒聙聶re not only reshaping what servicing and lending look like today芒聙聰we芒聙聶re creating opportunities for talented people to help drive the future of the industry.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">As we continue to grow, Valon is expanding its footprint across multiple states, opening the door to exciting new roles and career paths. Joining Valon means becoming part of a fast-scaling company where innovation, collaboration, and customer impact go hand in hand. Mortgage is just the beginning芒聙聰we芒聙聶re building the future of regulated finance, and we want you to be part of it.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>About the Role</strong></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to own all facets of data infrastructure at Valon. You will be responsible for managing/optimizing our core data infrastructure, building/maintaining custom data ingestion pipelines, optimizing/implementing complex data transformations, and partnering with the analytics team to architect the optimal long-term infra strategy for Valon. You will be the data team芒聙聶s infrastructure quarterback, and success will mean standing up the proper tooling or processes and flexibly problem-solving to ensure the team is able to carry out its mission efficiently and seamlessly.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">Core Data Infrastructure &amp; Scalability</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Own and optimize Valon芒聙聶s core data infrastructure for performance, reliability, and cost efficiency as data volume and complexity grow.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Design and extend multi-tenant data architectures to support a scalable SaaS model.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Evaluate and improve warehouse design, data models, and schema strategies to minimize redundancy and maximize query performance.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Lead and execute infrastructure migrations with minimal downtime and high data integrity.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Build and maintain custom ingestion pipelines for data sources not covered by ELT vendors.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em">Observability, Performance &amp; Maintenance</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Build or integrate observability tooling for pipeline health, latency, data freshness, drift detection, and schema change monitoring.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Optimize data transformation jobs for speed and cost efficiency, identifying performance bottlenecks and refactoring as needed.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Establish and run routine maintenance processes to ensure data quality, stability, and platform consistency.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Drive a culture of data reliability engineering by codifying best practices, automation, and operational excellence.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em">Strategic Leadership &amp; Enablement</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Define and communicate the long-term data infrastructure roadmap, aligning technical evolution with Valon芒聙聶s business growth.</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Think strategically: What does our infrastructure need to look like at 10x or 100x
